title: anoda triangularis
intro: Anoda triangularis, also known as the Butterfly Weed, is a flowering plant species native to tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, with its medicinal properties attributed to its high concentration of alkaloids, including rotenone and flavonoids. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and digestive problems, and its health benefits include antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. In herbal preparations, Anoda triangularis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
